name: _get_ui_context
description: Returns UI enrichment data for widgets. When documentId is provided, returns schema fields, deployed Studio URL, and resolved reference previews. When documentId is omitted, returns project-level context only (Studio URL).

dataset.description: The name of the dataset in the project

documentId.description: The document ID to fetch context for. When omitted, returns project-level context only (studio URL).

documentType.description: The document _type. When provided, the tool skips fetching the document to infer its type.

maxRefDepth.description: Maximum depth for collecting reference IDs from the document (default 2)

workspaceName.description: Workspace name as returned by `list_workspace_schemas`. Not a document type. Defaults to "default".
